name: Graham Haynes
abstract: Graham Haynes (born September 16, 1960 in Brooklyn, New York) is an American cornetist, trumpeter and composer. The son of jazz drummer Roy Haynes, Graham is known for his work in nu jazz, fusing jazz with elements of hip hop and electronic music.

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Jazz Band: An Evening of Irving Berlin and Cole Porter

works.t: Kiss Me, Kate: So In Love
